## 2025-02-14 - Exposed iFood API Token
**Vulnerability:** A valid iFood API OAuth token (`token.json`) was committed to the repository. The token had a long expiration date (2025), potentially allowing unauthorized access to the iFood Merchant API.
**Learning:** The application logic automatically regenerates this token if missing, but the file was not included in `.gitignore`, leading to accidental commit.
**Prevention:** Always ensure sensitive files generated by the application (tokens, credentials, temp files) are added to `.gitignore` immediately. Verified that `integra-ifood/src/Ifood/ifood.service.ts` handles the missing file gracefully by regenerating it.
